exercises.question: I enjoy _____ books in my free time.
I remember _____ the door. (Tôi nhớ là đã khóa cửa rồi)
exercises.explanation: Remember + Ving: nhớ đã làm gì (đã làm rồi).

exercises.question: I must remember _____ the door before going out. (Tôi phải nhớ khóa cửa)
exercises.explanation: Remember + to V: nhớ phải làm gì (chưa làm).

exercises.question: She stopped _____ as soon as she saw her mother.
exercises.explanation: Stop + Ving: dừng việc gì (dừng việc khóc).

exercises.question: We stopped _____ some water at the supermarket.
exercises.explanation: Stop + to V: dừng lại để làm gì (dừng lại để mua nước).

exercises.question: Are you interested in _____ for us?
Thank you very much for _____ me to your party.
Before _____ out, I phoned Sarah.
exercises.explanation: Giới từ 'before' + Ving tạo thành cụm giới từ làm sung ngữ.

exercises.question: I'm looking forward to _____ her.
exercises.explanation: Look forward to + Ving (to là giới từ, không phải to V).

exercises.question: It's no use _____ about it.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc It's no use + Ving: tốn công vô ích khi làm gì.

exercises.question: She couldn't help _____.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc can't help + Ving: không thể nhịn/kiềm chế được.

exercises.question: I had no trouble _____ a place to stay.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc have trouble + Ving: gặp khó khăn khi làm gì.

exercises.question: He spent hours _____ to repair the clock.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc spend time + Ving: dành thời gian làm gì.

exercises.question: I prefer _____ home to going out.
exercises.explanation: Cấu trúc prefer Ving 1 to Ving 2: thích cái gì hơn cái gì.
